title: Task Packet v1
description: Concrete unit of work delivered to a Worker by the Packet Compiler. Carries the complete context a Worker needs to execute a phase: goal, constraints, dependencies, acceptance criteria, capability requirements, context budget, and escalation conditions. Producer: Hymenium (via Packet Compiler role). Consumer: Worker agent.

phase_id.description: Which phase within the workflow this packet belongs to (e.g., 'implement', 'audit').

goal.description: Concrete description of what success looks like for this task. Should be specific enough that a Worker can determine when the goal is met.

constraints.description: Hard rules the Worker must respect: allowed write scope, non-goals, and prohibited actions.

dependencies.description: Other task IDs or artifact references this packet depends on (must be resolved before execution).

acceptance_criteria.description: Exact conditions that must be satisfied for the Output Verifier to accept this task's output.

tier.description: Minimum agent tier required to execute this task.

tools.description: Tool names the Worker must have access to (e.g., 'bash', 'read', 'write').

capability_requirements.description: Capability requirements for the Worker executing this task.

max_tokens.description: Maximum token budget for this task execution.

max_turns.description: Maximum number of turns allowed for this task execution.

context_budget.description: Optional context budget limits. Omit to apply template defaults.

escalation_conditions.description: Conditions under which the Worker must stop and escalate rather than retry (e.g., 'spec ambiguity', 'dependency missing').
